name: daily-call-tasks
description: A 3-skill suite around the calls you attended: daily-call-tasks (read-only cited digest of YOUR action items from yesterday's attended calls, unattended-safe morning routine), daily-call-tasks-commit (interactive, human-confirmed creation of the chosen items as ClickUp tasks, self only), and morning-brief (interactive Geekbot-style standup prep — what you did / on your plate / blockers / open questions, then auto-post to Geekbot with correct Slack mentions).
requirements: **Google Calendar** + **Google Drive** connectors (sub-agents on **Sonnet**). `-commit` + `morning-brief` also need the **ClickUp MCP** + a one-time `/morning-brief --onboard` identity. `morning-brief` optionally uses a **Geekbot** API key, the **Gmail** connector, and a **team.md** roster (all degrade gracefully if absent).
